case_title: PAMELA TURNER VS. STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TURNER, PAMELA AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY STEVE JUNIPHANT--EMPLOYEE. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT.PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TURNER, PAMELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
